case_title: ATLAS TOWING SERVICES, INC. VS. HORIZON COACH LINES

docket_entries.description: THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF ATLAS TOWING SERVICES, INC. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT HORIZON COACH LINES (FRANK SHERMAN CEO) $2,050.75 PRINCIPAL, $65.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,115.75 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY PLAINTIFF ATLAS TOWING SERVICES, INC.
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF ATLAS TOWING SERVICES, INC. AS TO DEFENDANT HORIZON COACH LINES (FRANK SHERMAN CEO)
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED MAY-04-2015, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT HORIZON COACH LINES (FRANK SHERMAN CEO)
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,050.75 FILED BY ATLAS TOWING SERVICES, INC. AS TO DEFENDANT HORIZON COACH LINES (FRANK SHERMAN CEO) ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUN-24-2015 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
COPYING FEES (10 PAGE) PAID BY PLAINTIFF ATLAS TOWING SERVICES, INC.

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JUN-24-2015 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JUN-24-2015 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF, ONLY. PLAINTIFF WAS REPRESENTED BY MARK YEBRA--MANAGER. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUN-24-2015 - JUDGMENT.
